steps.title: Find two points on the line of best fit
steps.content:
From the scatterplot, the line of best fit passes through the points (0,0.5) and (20,6.5).
Compute the slope: $$m=\frac{6.5-0.5}{20-0}=\frac{6}{20}=0.3$$.
The y-intercept is the y-value when x=0, which is 0.5.
Thus the equation of the line is $$y=0.3x+0.5$$.

steps.title: Evaluate at x=25.5 and select the answer
steps.content:
Substitute x=25.5 into the equation: $$y=0.3(25.5)+0.5=7.65+0.5=8.15$$.
This rounds to 8.2.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
